message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame idxmin/idxmax (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.idxmin() and
DataFrame.idxmax():

- idxmin_basic: 3-row utf8-indexed frame, returns row label of the
  per-column minimum
- idxmax_basic: same shape, per-column maximum row label

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.idxmin()/.idxmax() and emits expected_series), runs the Rust
DataFrame.idxmin()/.idxmax(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. DataFrameIdxmin / Idxmax were already wired
through the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle test
gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-n80mx]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
